pmid.description: The PubMed ID of the paper being analyzed.

entities.description: Biomedical entities identified in the abstract.

name.description: Exact name as it appears in the text.

confidence.description: Confidence that this is correctly identified (1.0 = unambiguous).

mentions.description: Number of times this entity is mentioned in the abstract.

relationships.description: Relationships between entities identified in the abstract.

source.description: Name of the source entity (must match an entity in the entities list).

target.description: Name of the target entity (must match an entity in the entities list).

type.description: Type of relationship between source and target.

evidence_text.description: Brief excerpt from the abstract that supports this relationship.
